text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Check it out, Trainer! That street band over
there is tearin' it up!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh man! I wanna be in a band, too!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: You? In a band? Do you even play an instrument?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's with the attitude?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I-If I just practice, I can do it, no sweat!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There are a bunch of different positions in a
band, but I'd be—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'd be the lead singer, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Nobody asked you. Stay out of it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What about you, Trainer? What would you play?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, great minds think alike! I'd totally play
guitar too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The way the guitarist's fingers race across the
strings is so awesome. Don't ya think?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Vweeeee!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: And that squeal! That sound is the absolute best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. No one's here... That means I can really
make my air guitar sing!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Vweeeee! Vweee, vweee, vweeeee!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, you guys! Now I'm gonna show ya the
best guitar skills ever!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Vweee, vweee! VWEEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow the sound of clamoring voices to find
Vodka surrounded by a large group of people.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Get outta here! I said get! This isn't a show!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Augh, you're here too?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I got really into my "performance," and before I
realized... I was surrounded.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Vodka! That performance was so cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Other people start saying the same thing, and the
crowd erupts in applause.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so? It was... cool?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wait, no! I said it before, this isn't a show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her objections, Vodka looks pretty
happy to me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! Nice! You know what you're talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When the reverb of those powerful drum beats
reach your very core...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's just so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Vocals and drums get all the attention, but drums
ain't no slouch either.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm surprised they aren't more popular...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next morning...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, who the heck threw away these cardboard
boxes in front of the dorm?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They'll get in everyone's way, tossed on the
ground like this...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Wait a sec. Good size, easy to hit...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: These would make perfect drums!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're just trash, so no one'll mind if I have a
little fun with 'em!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ba-dum ba-dum ba-dum... Boom, boom! Boom, boom! ...Hah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh! That's what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Vodka. Do you know what happened to the
cardboard boxes that were over here?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I put some stuff in them for the next bazaar.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Don't tell me they're those beat-up boxes
over there...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-if you leave them outside like that, of course
people're gonna think they're trash!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
"Trash?!" Come on! You could have at least
looked inside first!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's not my fault! How should I have known?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They keep arguing until they both run out of
energy...
